name: Dollar Tree
analysis: DLTR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 19% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry $115.3700, stop $106.4646, target $135.1800 (2.22:1) — then trail it.
